parameters: _Chaos(id='classify.zero_results', patches=[('dinary.background.classification.task.parse_receipt', {'return_value': ParsedReceipt(store_name='', store_pib='', total_amount=100.0, invoice_number='INV-PIPE', items=[ReceiptItem(name_raw='HLEB', unit_price=100.0, quantity=1.0, total_price=100.0, tax_label='E')], items_total=100.0, total_ok=True, used_journal_fallback=False, purchase_datetime=None)}), ('dinary.background.classification.task.classify_receipt', {'return_value': ClassifyOutcome(results=[], broker_unavailable=False, execution_failed=False, execution=<MagicMock id='140330185678464'>)})])
